outputs: Return path cannot be calculated while the route remembers you arriving.
The handbook denies having used that term.
The water in the west stairwell has passed inspection. It should not be thanked.
Stairwell B: do not hum back. This is not a test.
warnings: If the response includes water, assume facilities jurisdiction unless the water is standing in a room that has been administratively removed.
When a command returns silence, the silence should be treated as a complete sentence for the purpose of audit review.
The operator should read the output only once. A second reading may produce a different room but the same filing requirement.
